# kbs-kustomz.vercel.app

> KB’s Kustomz is a locally owned custom paint and body shop in Wyanet, IL, 
                owned and operated by Kory Brown. Conveniently located at 13845 1650 N Ave, Wyanet, IL, 
                KB’s Kustomz specializes in custom automotive paint, auto body repair, and custom vehicle 
                enhancements tailored to your vision. Whether you’re looking for a custom paint job, 
                bodywork repairs, or a complete vehicle transformation, KB’s Kustomz delivers high-quality 
                craftsmanship and attention to detail you can trust.

## Home

[KB's Kustomz | Custom Paint and Body Shop| Wyanet, IL](https://kbs-kustomz.vercel.app/): KB’s Kustomz is a locally owned custom paint and body shop in Wyanet, IL, 
                owned and operated by Kory Brown. Conveniently located at 13845 1650 N Ave, Wyanet, IL, 
                KB’s Kustomz specializes in custom automotive paint, auto body repair, and custom vehicle 
                enhancements tailored to your vision. Whether you’re looking for a custom paint job, 
                bodywork repairs, or a complete vehicle transformation, KB’s Kustomz delivers high-quality 
                craftsmanship and attention to detail you can trust.

## About

[About KB’s Kustomz | Custom Paint & Auto Body Shop in Wyanet, IL](https://kbs-kustomz.vercel.app/about): KB’s Kustomz is a Wyanet, IL auto body shop specializing in custom paint and body repair.Free quotes available.

## Services

[Custom Paint & Auto Body Services in Wyanet, IL | KB’s Kustomz](https://kbs-kustomz.vercel.app/services): KB’s Kustomz offers professional custom paint, auto body repair, and vehicle restoration services in Wyanet, IL. Call today for a free quote.
